name: AI Resume Reviewer
tagline: Review resumes as a recruiter, ATS system, and senior engineer before applying.
description:
AI Resume Reviewer is an Anna App for students, freshers, and job seekers who need concrete resume feedback before applying. Upload or paste a resume, add a target role or job description, then review the output through recruiter, ATS, and senior-engineer perspectives.

What's inside:

- Resume upload and paste intake for text, markdown, PDF, and DOCX files.
- ATS score, missing keywords, priority problems, and section-level suggestions.
- Reviewer perspectives for recruiter screening, ATS matching, and senior technical review.
- Approval workflow that saves accepted changes as versions.
- Persistent version history and feedback notes through Anna storage.

The app uses Anna's host LLM through a bundled Executa when sampling is granted. It also includes deterministic fallback analysis for offline development and no-LLM previews.
